CheckTitle: Ensure user risk policy is configured to block high-risk users
Description: Verifies that at least one enabled Conditional Access policy responds to user risk levels (high) by requiring password change or blocking access. Requires Entra ID P2.
Risk: Without user risk policies, accounts flagged as compromised by Identity Protection (leaked credentials, suspicious activity patterns) continue to operate normally, giving attackers persistent access.

Remediation.Recommendation: Create a Conditional Access policy targeting All Users with user risk level set to High, requiring secure password change or blocking access.
